fixture imported-mail-consumer
identity example:imported-mail-consumer 0.1.0
imports
  DatabaseMarker = marker-core:mail:DatabaseMarker
  CommitSequence = marker-core:mail:CommitSequence
resolved_imports
  DatabaseMarker = marker_core::schema::mail::DatabaseMarker
  CommitSequence = marker_core::schema::mail::CommitSequence
macro_trace
  applied RootImports -> RootInput -> SchemaEnumVariants -> RootOutput -> SchemaEnumVariants -> RootNamespace -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields -> SchemaStructDefinition -> SchemaStructFields
  positions RootImports -> RootInput -> EnumVariants -> RootOutput -> EnumVariants -> RootNamespace -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields -> NamespaceDeclaration -> StructFields
input Input
  Record(Entry)
  Observe(Query)
  Mark(DatabaseMarker)
  Commit(CommitSequence)
output Output
  Recorded(RecordReceipt)
  Observed(RecordSet)
  Marked(DatabaseMarker)
  Committed(CommitSequence)
  Rejected(Rejection)
namespace
  newtype Topic = String
  newtype Topics = Vec<Topic>
  newtype Description = String
  newtype AgentName = String
  newtype RecordIdentifier = Integer
  newtype Rejection = Description
  struct Entry
    topics: Topics
    description: Description
    agent_name: AgentName
    database_marker: DatabaseMarker
  struct Query
    topics: Topics
    limit: Option<Integer>
  struct RecordReceipt
    record_identifier: RecordIdentifier
    database_marker: DatabaseMarker
    commit_sequence: CommitSequence
  struct RecordSet
    records: Vec<Entry>
    by_topic: KeyValue<Topic, RecordIdentifier>
